textByHash.1808c45932d7c5c4e7ecdea04ebcb7ab6b9e1a8a: We're currently facing an issue in the Tower of Magic. No one may enter until the issue is resolved.
textByHash.7306e0ffb31a855aa4ee5bb38b4cb70033f9e5f8: A death? This isn't good. The death you speak of may be connected to the issue we are currently facing. You'd better go in.
textByHash.9fa982bc29405aa3d3680047b6fd37f3fd5f50c1: We need to deal with these souls!
textByHash.a0f709c3e57cc163f1f6d974a5ef4e69f732f865: Thank you for helping with those souls. You should head upstairs and speak with Asteros Arceuus. He might be able to fill you in on what's happening here.
textByHash.de2f6bb3ff704a1e15e8f33feb04e1b66fc628f3: The Tower of Magic is off limits. Lord Arceuus does not wish his experiments to be disturbed.
textByHash.89f50a60f93e33bd65f04522a42bf074fae439d9: You have been granted permission to enter the Tower of Magic. Move along.
textByHash.e83977a419312898bc2a671b1a08a6e046642cd3: I can't talk I'm afraid. I need to time this experiment.
textByHash.4f62dd9461865c1d8a6b3d23ae08d411c1733fea: Please be careful near the apparatus.
textByHash.7f8de343136ad6700677b013735fe53e5fdd2d22: Hmmm... Maybe eye of newt will work...
textByHash.d1a3b33dec09284563fe4f2762bd65b080f368f3: It's going to be interesting to see the results of this test.
